title: Dondisia epipactis
parts: Dondisia epipactis, which is a synonym for Epipactis, is a type of orchid. The medicinal parts of Epipactis, specifically the leaves and roots, have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. These parts have been studied for their potential in treating various health conditions, including cardiovascular disease and diabetes. The orchid's extracts have also been found to have antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Further research is needed to fully understand the medicinal potential of Epipactis.
